_comment: FLAT-FAVORITE config (REAL MONEY, deployed 2026-06-29, user-authorized). strategy=flat_favorite: enter the favorite ONLY if its price has been FLAT (|mid change|<=flat_tol over `lookback` ticks) at the first in-band tick, else SKIP the market; hold to settlement (stop_p=0). buy_p LOWERED 0.76->0.55 to ride the flat signal in the mid band. WHY: a deep study of 6325 archive markets found FLAT favorites win FAR above their price while RISING/FADING ones have ~0 edge -- and this SURVIVED the same placebo that killed every prior 'edge' (200 paired label-shuffle splits: flat beats its null in 92-100% of splits, p<0.001; win-edge +8.3pp at 0.55 vs current 0.76-trade-all -2.7pp). Validated through the real engine: flat_favorite@0.55 fires ~19% (vs 92% trade-all) at ~85% win, matching the study. TRADE-OFF: ~1/5 the trade frequency. Caveat: validated IN-SAMPLE only -- this live run IS the forward test (user OK with ~$100 risk, ~$1/trade). max_slip_below floor gate still active in execution.py. Prior 0.76-fav_hold backup on box.
